task_summaries.task_scope: Assess if strongly correlated feature pairs in evidence e13 to e22 are exact duplicates or derived from common base features
Evaluate dependency concentration profiles of strong correlation pairs in evidence e13 to e22 to distinguish natural definitions from redundancy
Examine class-conditioned stability of strong correlations in evidence e13 to e22 to detect conditional artifacts
Investigate potential shortcut-like predictive leverage from redundant feature pairs in evidence e13 to e22
